Tethered boat off D/S side of bridge. Second CC passed. Typical Heading Error: < 0.924°. Vector Addition Of Single And Double Cycle Errors: 1.021°. Two MBT loops performed. First one failed to exceed 180 seconds. MBT loop 001 passes criteria and indicates no moving bed. BT used as reference. Change due to suggested Extrap automatic fit is >1% (-10.48% with Constant/No Slip 1.000) and therefore should be applied but is not due to WinRiver allowing a maximum exponent of 0.5. Measured Q is less than 50% (46.82%). Some ambiguity velocities occur at RB due to variable flow. Numerous QA/QC concerns deemed a SxS measurement necessary. ‘Flow Angle Coefficient ’varies from 0.92 to 0.98. ‘Water depth source: Bottom Track’ used for all panels. Sources:Manual

Percentage of bad bottom track values exceeds 5.0. Proceeded to ‘Section-by-Section’ measurement. Consistent ‘Flow Angle Coefficient’ of 0.98 used for entire width. ‘Water depth source: Bottom Track’ used for all panels. Sources:Manual
Source:Manual Sensor Reset Correction of -0.010
Source:Manual Sensor Reset Correction of -0.005

Clothesline 15m U/S of shelter. First CC used. Typical Heading Error: < 1.178°. Vector Addition Of Single And Double Cycle Errors: 1.649°. Turbulence and/or turbidity was too great for StreamPro to perform MBT and Moving Boat Method. Transducer could not effectively penetrate water column. Switched to Section-by-Section.  Difficulty getting >30 valid ensembles near edges within reasonable time frame with ‘Water depth source: Bottom Track’. Strategy was to use ‘Water depth source: Bottom Track’ for the standard 40sec or until a depth was detected and then switch to ‘Water depth source: Manual Depth’ and enter the detected depth. This worked well. Profile looks accurate for location. ‘Flow Angle Coefficient’ varied between 0.99 and 0.98 over the course of the transect. Sources:Manual

MBT Loop 000 indicates no correction recommended. Transects 001, 002, and 003 discarded due to uneven boat operation. Right edge exceeds 5% (8%). REVISION (20170213) - QRev processing applied. Extrapolation exponent of 0.7250 with Constant/No Slip applied within QRev. Discharge (34.6) & mean velocity (0.90) values corrected within Aquarius.
